about_timeline.title: Our Story
about_timeline.subtitle: A Journey of Passion
about_timeline.description: From a small kitchen dream to Dubai's beloved artisan bakery.
about_timeline.timeline_item_1_text: Started baking from a home kitchen with a passion for creating joy through sweets.
about_timeline.timeline_item_2_text: Opened our doors at Montpelier Parade, serving the Dubai community.
about_timeline.timeline_item_3_text: Launched our custom cake design studio for weddings and celebrations.
about_timeline.timeline_item_4_text: Recognized as one of Dubai's top artisan bakeries.

testimonials.title: Sweet Words
testimonials.subtitle: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.description: Don't just take our word for it — hear from our happy customers.
testimonials.testimonial_1_text: The most beautiful and delicious wedding cake! Our guests couldn't stop talking about it.
testimonials.testimonial_2_text: Best croissants in Dubai, hands down. The butter croissant is absolutely perfect.
testimonials.testimonial_3_text: They made my daughter's birthday cake exactly as she imagined. True artists!
testimonials.testimonial_4_text: Fresh bread every morning and the most friendly staff. This is my go-to bakery.
testimonials.testimonial_5_text: The custom cake service is incredible. They turned my vision into a masterpiece.
